title: DNA Extraction Protocol for Animal Blood Samples Using E.Z.N.A. Blood Mini Kit
author: Louis-Stéphane Le Clercq
materials: Discard the filtrate and reuse Collection Tube.
Discard the filtrate and reuse the Collection Tube.
Optional: Apply filtrate to column and repeat centrifugation.

steps.title: Transfer the Sample into a sterile...
steps.instruction: Transfer the Sample into a sterile microcentrifuge tube and bring the volume up to 250 µL with 10mMTris-HCl, PBS, or Elution Buffer (provided).

steps.title: Add 260 µL 100% Ethanol Contributed by users
steps.instruction: Add 260 µL 100% Ethanol Contributed by users . Vortex at maximum speed for 00:00:20 seconds.

steps.title: Insert a HiBind DNA Mini Column...
steps.instruction: Insert a HiBind DNA Mini Column (provided) into a 2 mL Collection Tube. Green HiBind columns to be placed in clear collection tubes. Can label samples on cap.

steps.title: Add 700 µL DNA Wash Buffer (provided)
steps.instruction: Add 700 µL DNA Wash Buffer (provided). DNA Wash Buffer must be diluted with 100% ethanol before use.

steps.title: Centrifuge the empty HiBind DNA Mini...
steps.instruction: Centrifuge the empty HiBind DNA Mini Column at 13000 x g, 21 °C, 2 minutes . It is important to dry the column membrane before elution. Residual ethanol may interfere with downstream applications.

steps.title: Transfer the HiBind DNA Mini Column...
steps.instruction: Transfer the HiBind DNA Mini Column into a nuclease-free 2 mL microcentrifuge tube.

steps.title: Add 25 µL Proteinase K Solution...
steps.instruction: Add 25 µL Proteinase K Solution (provided), 250 µL BL Buffer (provided), and 5 µL RNase I - 25,000 units New England Biolabs Catalog #M0243L (50 mg/mL).

steps.title: Vortex at maximum speed for 00:00:15 seconds
steps.instruction: Vortex at maximum speed for 00:00:15 seconds.

steps.title: Incubate at 65 °C for 00:10:00 minutes
steps.instruction: Incubate at 65 °C for 00:10:00 minutes. Vortex briefly once during incubation. Heating block set to 65 degrees Celsius.

steps.title: Centrifuge briefly to collect any drops...
steps.instruction: Centrifuge briefly to collect any drops from the inside of the lid.

steps.title: Transfer the entire sample to the column
steps.instruction: Transfer the entire sample to the column.

steps.title: Centrifuge at 11000 x g, 21 °C, 1 minute
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at 11000 x g, 21 °C, 1 minute

steps.title: Add 500 µL HBC Buffer
steps.instruction: Add 500 µL HBC Buffer. HBC Buffer must be diluted with 100% isopropanol before use.

steps.title: Discard the filtrate and the Collection Tube
steps.instruction: Discard the filtrate and the Collection Tube. Insert the HiBind DNA Mini Column into a new 2 mL Collection Tube.

steps.title: Centrifuge at 11000 x g, 21 °C, 1 minute
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at 11000 x g, 21 °C, 1 minute

steps.title: Centrifuge at 10000 x g, 21 °C, 1 minute
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at 10000 x g, 21 °C, 1 minute

steps.title: Add 50 µL Elution Buffer heated to 65 °C
steps.instruction: Add 50 µL Elution Buffer heated to 65 °C .

steps.title: Incubate the HiBind DNA Mini Column...
steps.instruction: Incubate the HiBind DNA Mini Column at 65 °C for 00:05:00 .

steps.title: Centrifuge at 13000 x g, 21 °C, 2 minutes
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at 13000 x g, 21 °C, 2 minutes .

steps.title: Store eluted DNA at -20 °C
